commit 7ed83ba32335e4b29209b288731f29386137f9b1
Author: superinstance <superinstance@users.noreply.github.com>
Date:   Wed Apr 22 18:23:03 2026 +0000

    🎣📚 Domain-specific apps: FishingLog + StudyLog
    
    New web terminal routes:
    - /fishinglog — catch logging with species, weight, location, conditions
    - /studylog — study session tracker with timer, confidence scoring
    
    Both apps:
    - localStorage persistence (works offline)
    - PLATO tile submission (sends insights to fleet)
    - Dark theme, mobile responsive
    
    FishingLog features:
    - Species datalist (10 Alaskan species)
    - Weight/count, location, depth, temp, tide, moon phase, bait/gear
    - History view with catch entries
    - Stats: total catches, total weight, species count, best catch
    
    StudyLog features:
    - Pomodoro-style timer (start/pause/reset)
    - Session logging with subject, duration, method, insight, confidence
    - 7 study methods: reading, practice, video, tutorial, flashcards, teaching, project
    - History view with confidence tracking
